title: Rescission for lesion beyond moiety unavailable
doc_html:
§17.  Rescission for lesion beyond moiety unavailable

A sale of a mineral right is not subject to rescission for lesion beyond moiety.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
